reason: PO 2026-06-30: focus/present should expand descendants + centre (current expands ancestors)

node.statement: Focus/presentation drill-in — focusing or presenting a builder object expands the object's DESCENDANT subtree (children + grandchildren: a phase expands its actions and their tasks; an action expands its tasks) and centres it in the stage (per REQ-FP-CMA-003). This corrects the current behavior where StageProvider.enterPresentationMode (and useStageExpansion) expand only the target's ANCESTORS and collapse the subtree — the opposite of the intended drill-in. Keep it minimal: expand descendants + centre; do NOT add ancestor/unrelated-collapse complexity. Implemented/fixed in WM-5.
